# USMC - United Shared Memory Client

## Last-checked: 2026-06-11

USMC is the ellmos shared-memory primitive: a zero-dependency Python library and CLI that lets multiple LLM agents share local SQLite-backed memory. Use it when an agent framework needs persistent facts, lessons learned, working notes, session handoff records, and compact prompt context without a daemon or cloud service.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc
Canonical search names: ellmos USMC, ellmos-usmc, United Shared Memory Client, LLM shared memory, cross-agent memory, agent memory SQLite.

Important disambiguation: this project is not related to the United States Marine Corps. In search and directory listings, prefer "ellmos USMC" or "United Shared Memory Client" over the bare acronym.

## Audience

- **LLM agent developers**: building multi-agent systems that need persistent shared memory across runs
- **Python developers integrating AI**: adding durable knowledge storage to agent pipelines without a server
- **ellmos stack users**: USMC is the Tier 1 memory primitive for BACH and Rinnsal
- **MCP server and tool builders**: lightweight local SQLite memory backend with zero runtime dependencies

## Search Phrases

```
ellmos USMC shared memory
LLM agent shared memory Python
cross-agent memory SQLite no daemon
usmc agent memory library
ellmos United Shared Memory Client
persistent facts LLM agent Python
multi-agent memory library zero dependency
agent context generation SQLite
```

## Core capabilities

- Persistent facts with confidence scores
- Lessons learned as reusable problem/solution records
- Session-scoped working memory and scratchpad notes
- Session tracking with handoff notes
- Compact context generation for LLM prompts
- Poll-based change sync via SQLite
- Python client API, high-level helper API, and CLI
- No runtime dependencies outside the Python standard library

## Quick install

```bash
pip install git+https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc.git
```

The PyPI package name `usmc` is reserved for this project but not published yet.

## Related ellmos projects

- USMC: Tier 1 shared memory primitive
- Rinnsal: Tier 2 compact orchestration layer built on USMC
- BACH: Tier 3 full text-based LLM operating system

## Good references

- README: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc/blob/main/README.md
- German README: https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc/blob/main/README_de.md
